name: Fire Risk - Smoke Prevention
description: Reviews supplied site images for outdoor smoking facilities and non-smoking signage, then returns structured field results.

inputParameters.name: images
inputParameters.description: One or more site images to review.

outputParameter.name: resultFields
outputParameter.description: Structured result fields returned by the skill.

value.name: smoke-signage-comments
value.description: Comments on the non smoking signage.
